title: Agilent and A*STAR's SIFBI Sign Research Collaboration Agreement to Advance Singapore Agri-Food Industry
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) recently signed a Research Collaboration Agreement (RCA) with the Singapore Institute of Food and Biotechnology Innovation (SIFBI) outlining their collaboration on developing food research knowledge advancement over the next two years. SIFBI is a research institute under the Agency for Science, Technology, and Research (A*STAR) in Singapore. This collaboration aims to bring state-of-the-art science and technology to drive

title: Agilent Announces the Innovative Seahorse XF Pro Analyzer
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today announced the release of the Agilent Seahorse XF Pro Analyzer, featuring new pharma-oriented workflow solutions incorporating advanced experimental design and analysis tools. With enhanced performance, more robust and efficient workflows, and an optimized user experience, the XF Pro enables operators at any skill level to access the most advanced cellular metabolism analysis technology for understanding cellular fat

title: Agilent Presents Thought Leader Award to Professor Jason Kovacic
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) today announced that Professor Jason Kovacic has been selected to receive a prestigious Agilent Thought Leader Award. Professor Kovacic is being recognized for his influential research on cardiovascular disease—specifically the pathobiology of vascular diseases, coronary artery disease, fibromuscular dysplasia and spontaneous coronary artery dissection.
